creator: rometravelers
caption:
Skip the crowds and explore Rome’s hidden gems with @mygentleescape !🇮🇹✨

💡Doria Pamphili Gallery: Historic palace with a private collection featuring Caravaggio, Titian, and Velázquez.

💡Galleria Sciarra: Quiet Art Nouveau courtyard near the Trevi Fountain with frescoes celebrating women.

💡Villa Farnesina: Renaissance villa with stunning frescoes by Raphael, located near Trastevere.

Which hidden gem would you visit first on your Rome trip? 🏛️✨

📍Rome 🇮🇹
